goals: Store initial research preferences about road technology and transportation innovations
Search for existing memories about road technology research topics
Review all stored memories to understand current knowledge base
Clean up outdated or irrelevant memories about previous road technology research

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented. Prefers organized tracking of research interests and systematic documentation of new technology explorations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in transportation infrastructure and road technology policy. Unfamiliar with memory management tools or APIs - treats this as a personal knowledge assistant.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored initial research preferences, searched for relevant context, reviewed all stored memories, and removed any outdated entries related to road technology research.
